title: dysoxylum cauliflorum
intro: Dysoxylum cauliflorum, also known as the Philippine Dysoxylum, is a plant species native to the Philippines and is classified under the family Meliaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its bark and leaves containing bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Dysoxylum cauliflorum include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which have been reported to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Dysoxylum cauliflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, with the dried leaves and bark being commonly used in traditional folk medicine.
